info.title: Booster BC API Documentation
info.description:
# Booster BC API
Is the fastest and lightest hotel distribution API  for developing your own travel website or mobile app. 

Booster BC API Hotels is made up of two APIs : 
     
- [Hotel Content API]() : Find, book and manage your reservations with ease.
     
- [Hotel Booking API]() : Get detailed information about our portfolio of hotels, including images, descriptions, and more.

Booster BC API is delivered via HTTPS POST, GET, and DELETE requests. Request and response data is in JSON format, which allows you to easily create requests and analyze responses in a standard way using the tools included with most modern languages.

tags.name: Getting Started
Hotel Content API
tags.description:
Hotel Content API has been designed to retrieve all the details of the hotels available in our [Hotel Booking API]().

Hotel Content API contains several methods that allow you to obtain the details of the hotels as well as list of countries, cities, hotel chain and hotel themes that complement the hotels information.

Note that the Languages operation is connected to all the operations in which a description is returned, since we return the language code in which that description has been returned.

tags.name: Hotel Booking API
tags.description:
Hotel Booking API is designed to book hotels in real time as fast as in two steps. It covers the complete booking process; it allows generating lists of hotels, getting lists of bookings, obtaining booking information, making cancellations and modify existing bookings.

Hotel Booking API works in combination with [Hotel Content API]() to obtain content information from the hotels, such as pictures, description, facilities, etc.

Please refer to the [Hotel Content API]() documentation  for related information.

tags.name: Certification
tags.description:
In this section, we'll provide you with all the information you need to complete the certification process, which will ensure your integration  is ready.


You can contact us with any doubts or questions at [https://support.boosterbc.com]() .
## Certification goals
   The Certification process intention is to test and ensure that your integration was properly developed, that functionality and implementation of the relevant and mandatory information are done correctly and without errors.
   
 Having said that, our certification process will look at 6 different steps.
 
## Step1
    Below is the list of test cases that needs to be executed by clients at their end. JSON Request/ Response for these cases along with the confirmation  numbers and screenshots under the folder  associeted to each case will be required for verification as part of certification process:
    
     
   | Number | Case      | Logs  |
   |---------------|------------------------|----------------------------------|
   | 1 |Create a booking for 1 room for 1 adult| Screenshots: case1;BookingRef:|
   |---------------|------------------------|----------------------------------|
   | 2|Create a booking for 1 room  for 2 children(8,10)|Screenshots: case2 ; BookingRef:|
   |---------------|------------------------|----------------------------------|
   | 3|Create a booking for 2 rooms for 2 adults (2 nights)  |Screenshots: case3;BookingRef:|
   |---------------|------------------------|----------------------------------|
   | 4| Create a booking for 2rooms: 1 rooms for 1 adult + 2 children(5,3) +1 infant and 1 room for 3 adults|Screenshots: case4;BookingRef:|
   |---------------|------------------------|----------------------------------|
   | 5|Create a booking for 2 rooms: 1 room for 2 adults and 1 room for 2 children |Screenshots: case5;BookingRef: |
   |---------------|------------------------|----------------------------------|
   | 6|Create a booking for 2 rooms: 1 room for 2 adults + 2 children(8,10)and 1 room for 4 adults.|Screenshots: case6;BookingRef: |
   |---------------|------------------------|----------------------------------|
   | 7|Create a booking for 3 rooms: 1 room for 2 adults, 1 room for 2 adults and 1 room for  1 adult+1child(7)|Screenshots: case7;BookingRef: |
   |---------------|------------------------|----------------------------------|
   | 8|Create a booking for 2 rooms: 1 room for 2 adults+1infant and 1room for 2 children+1infant|Screenshots:case8;BookingRef: |
   |---------------|------------------------|----------------------------------|
   | 9|Create a booking for 1 room for 1 adult with a with a compulsory dinner supplement : |Screenshots:case9;BookingRef: |
     
     
  
      
       
       
       


    
    
    
    
    
 
## Step2
   Remember to send us the following information on your request, these may include:
   
       •  Search
       •  Availability
       •  CheckRate
       •  Book
       •  voucher
       •  Cancel


## Step3
       For all confirmed reservations, it is mandatory to generate a voucher containing all the information regarding the reservation and allow the client (either if it's B2B or B2C) to get it easily.
       Please, check that the following information appears at the voucher (and it is correctly informed).
       It's mandatory to display:
       
           •  Hotel Address
           •  Hotel telephone number
           •  HotelName
           •  Paxes Names
           •  Room type
           •  board type
           •  payable by the supplier
           •  Chekin -chechout
           •  rateComents
           •  bookingRef
           •  secondRef

 ## Step4
     Client makes a certification request by providing JSON Request/ Response along with booking reference for the test cases as suggested in Step 1.
     
 ## Step5
     Booster BC  will verify the test cases using JSON Request/ Response and suggest, if there is any change required. The turnaround time for the test case verification is around 4-5 days working days.   

 ## Step6
     On successful completion of all the above steps, Booster BC will provide Live access details to the client.

get.description: Returns the list of currently existing hotels.

parameters.name: hotelId
parameters.description: Filter to limit the results for an specific hotel

parameters.name: countryId
parameters.description: Filter to limit the results for an specific country.If country is not specified, Tunisia will be used as default country.

parameters.name: cityId
parameters.description: Filter to limit the results for a specific city .

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: The language code for the language in which you want the descriptions to be returned. If language is not specified, French will be used as default language.

400.description:
**BAD REQUEST** - The server cannot or will not process the request due to an apparent client error.

*INVALID_REQUEST* - The request is not compliant with the specified version of the API. The message body will contain more information

*INVALID_DATA* - The JSON or XML syntax is correct, however some of the fields contain incorrect data. Please check the documentation for the allowed values and follow the message returned in order to fix this error.

401.description:
**UNAUTHORIZED** - Authentication has failed or has not been provided.

* Authorization field missing

* Request signature verification failed

example.error: Request signature verification failed

403.description: **FORBIDDEN** - The credentials are correct and authorization was succesful, but access to this resource/operation is not allowed.

example.error: Access to this API has been disallowed

404.description: **NOT FOUND** - The requested resource could not be found. This error can be due to a temporary or permanent condition.

406.description: **NOT ACCEPTABLE** - The resource identified by the request is only capable of generating response entities which have content characteristics not acceptable according to the accept headers sent in the request.

415.description: **UNSUPPORTED MEDIA TYPE** - Use the Content-Type header to set application/json and be sure the format of your payload matches the format

429.description: **Rate limit exceeded** - The user has sent too many requests in a given amount of time.

500.description:
**INTERNAL SERVER ERROR** - An unexpected condition was encountered. Possible causes

*SYSTEM_ERROR* - These are internal server errors, please send us these errors together with the complete logs (JSON  requests and responses) at [support@boosterbc.com]() so that our team can review them. 

*PRODUCT_ERROR* - This type of error is produced due to product restrictions or due to other account set-up limitations. In all cases, the end result is that the booking cannot be confirmed. Here is a list

502.description: **BAD GATEWAY** - The server was acting as a gateway or proxy and received an invalid response from the upstream server.

503.description:
**SERVICE UNAVAILABLE** - The server is currently unable to handle the request due to a temporary condition which will be alleviated after some delay. You can choose to resend the request again.

*SERVICE_OVERLOAD* - The server is currently unable to handle the request due to an overwhelming number of requests being processed. Condition which will be alleviated after some delay.

504.description: **GATEWAY TIMEOUT** - The server is currently unable to handle the request due to a temporary condition which will be alleviated after some delay. You can choose to resend the request again.

513.description: **APPLICATION ERROR** - Indicates that an involved backend application returned an error or warning, which is passed back in the response message.

596.description: **SERVICE NOT FOUND** - An invalid endpoint has being reached. Please check that the endpoint you are using to send the petitions is correct.

get.description: Search hotels and rooms available in a given time period.

parameters.name: cityId
parameters.description: Filter to limit the results for an specific city.

parameters.name: itemsPerPage
parameters.description: The number of the hotels to receive. If nothing is specified, 10 is the default value.

parameters.name: hotelCodes
parameters.description: Filter to limit the results for specific hotels. Maximum 150 is recommended to send in one request separated by a comma.

parameters.name: checkin
parameters.description: Check-in date. Can not be greater than checkout.Must be in the formatted as YYYY-MM-DD

parameters.name: checkout
parameters.description: Check-out date.Must be in the formatted as YYYY-MM-DD

parameters.name: pax
parameters.description:
Data of the passengers assigned to a room. eg :

1x room :

  1 adult (single) : pax=1
  
  1 adult + 1 child(6 years old) :pax=1,6
  
  2 adults + 2 children (5 et 7 years old) :pax=2,5,7
  
  
2x room :

  (1 adult) + (1 adult + 1 child of 7 years old) : pax=1;1,7

parameters.name: clientNationality
parameters.description: Filter to limit the results for an specific nationality.

parameters.name: boardId
parameters.description: Filter to limit the results for an specific board.

parameters.name: hotelId
parameters.description: Filter to limit the results for an specific hotel.

parameters.name: hotelChainId
parameters.description: Filter to limit the results for an specific hotel chain.

parameters.name: rating
parameters.description: Filter to limit the results for an specific hotel rating.

401.description:
**UNAUTHORIZED** - Authentication has failed or has not been provided.

* Authorization field missing

* Request signature verification failed

example.error: Request API Key verification failed

403.description: **FORBIDDEN** - The credentials are correct and authorization was succesful, but access to this resource/operation is not allowed.

example.error: Access to this API has been disallowed

404.description: **NOT FOUND** - The requested resource could not be found. This error can be due to a temporary or permanent condition.

406.description: **NOT ACCEPTABLE** - The resource identified by the request is only capable of generating response entities which have content characteristics not acceptable according to the accept headers sent in the request.

415.description: **UNSUPPORTED MEDIA TYPE** - Use the Content-Type header to set application/json and be sure the format of your payload matches the format

429.description: **Rate limit exceeded** - The user has sent too many requests in a given amount of time.

500.description:
**INTERNAL SERVER ERROR** - An unexpected condition was encountered. Possible causes

*SYSTEM_ERROR* - These are internal server errors, please send us these errors together with the complete logs (JSON  requests and responses) at [support@boosterbc.com]() so that our team can review them. 

*PRODUCT_ERROR* - This type of error is produced due to product restrictions or due to other account set-up limitations. In all cases, the end result is that the booking cannot be confirmed. Here is a list

502.description: **BAD GATEWAY** - The server was acting as a gateway or proxy and received an invalid response from the upstream server.

503.description:
**SERVICE UNAVAILABLE** - The server is currently unable to handle the request due to a temporary condition which will be alleviated after some delay. You can choose to resend the request again.

*SERVICE_OVERLOAD* - The server is currently unable to handle the request due to an overwhelming number of requests being processed. Condition which will be alleviated after some delay.

504.description: **GATEWAY TIMEOUT** - The server is currently unable to handle the request due to a temporary condition which will be alleviated after some delay. You can choose to resend the request again.

513.description: **APPLICATION ERROR** - Indicates that an involved backend application returned an error or warning, which is passed back in the response message.

596.description: **SERVICE NOT FOUND** - An invalid endpoint has being reached. Please check that the endpoint you are using to send the petitions is correct.

get.description:
The booking list operation returns a list of bookings based on the search criteria. The most important information returned for each booking in the list is:

  *  Booking reference
  *  Booking holder
  *  Booking paxes
  *  Hotel, rooms and boards confirmed
  *  Booking rates
  
The results are returned in a paginated response that can be filtered with the use of parameters in the request.

lat.description: Latitude coordinate of the hotel location.

long.description: Longitude coordinate of the hotel location.

cityId.description: Identifier of the city of the hotel location.

countryId.description: Identifier of the country of the hotel location.

zoneId.description: Identifier of the zone of the hotel location.

themes.description: List of themes codes in the hotel.

facilities.description: List of facilities, amenities and installations in the hotel.

items.example: ["Air conditionné","Bien être","Club enfants","Golf","Parking","Piscine","Piscine couverte","Plage","Restaurant","Wifi Internet sans fil"]

text.example:
Delfino Beach Resort & Spa

L'hôtel 4*, construit dans un style mauresque typique, se situe près de Hammamet (à 6 Km du centre de Hammamet et 6 Km de Nabeul), au cœur d'un jardin de 100.000 m².
Directement en bord de mer sur une plage de fin sable blanc.

L'aéroport de Tunis est à ~ 65 Km, et l'aéroport d'Enfidha est à ~60 km.
De nombreux loisirs et activités sont à votre disposition, pour agrémenter votre séjour :
3 piscines extérieures (dont et une « relax-pool » réservée aux adultes) et une piscine intérieure (chauffée hors-saison).
Un centre de remise en forme, comprenant une piscine couverte, salle de fitness et de dance, salle de musculation, Cabines de massage, un Hammam, Saunas, Cabines Esthétiques, une salle de relaxation.
Pour les petits, un Mini-Club : Plusieurs salles de jeux et d'activités, salle de sieste, toilettes adaptées, cuisine, Piscine pour enfant, jardin et air de jeux. Egalement une salle à manger 7 pour famille avec buffets « Enfants ».
Disponible aussi : Salle de réunion, Boutiques et petit commerce, Scène de théâtre en plein-air, une salle de spectacle couverte, Discothèque Night-club.
Internet: Wi-Fi haut-débit à la réception (gratuit).
Le DELFINO BEACH offre une animationriche et variée, de jour comme de nuit. Un programme quotidien d'activités sportives, de divertissements, et de spectacles:
Beach-volley, tir à l'arc, centre de remise en forme, Fitness,marche nordique, aérobic, inline skating
Tennis: 10 courts en terre-battue. Leçons de tennis (cours collectifs).
Base nautique: catamarans Hobbies Cat, planches à voile et canoës. Cours et initiation.
Sport nautique à moteur (Ski nautique et banana-Boat)
Aussi: Beach soccer,Street-Ball, tennis de table, terrain de foot en gazon synthétique.

rateComments.example:
Taxe de Séjour: 

Une taxe touristique de séjour est appliquée à tous les clients (+12 ans) par nuitée, payable par le client à son départ de l’hôtel contre un reçu de 2 DT/nuitée/Adulte (pour hôtel 2* et 3*) et 3 DT/nuitée/Adulte (pour hôtel 4* et 5*) . Cette taxe n'est pas applicable à partir de la 8ème nuitée.

apiKey.description:
Your registered apikey.

 
  There is a simple step to starting development with Booster BC API.You must request an apiKey from [https://support.boosterbc.com]() .
apiKey.name: apiKey

Signature.description:
SHA-512 encoding signature.

 Your signature value is the SHA-512 hash of the concatenation of your API Key + Password + UTC timestamp in seconds.
Signature.name: signature

Timestamp.description:
UTC timestamp in seconds .

Your timestamp value must be the same value used to generate your signature. If a different timestamp value is provided, your request will be rejected
Timestamp.name: timestamp
